channel.title: Gil Rodrigues - Gil Rodrigues Barbosa - Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa (gildrb)
channel.description: Gil Rodrigues is the public display name of Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa, also known as Gil Rodrigues Barbosa and gildrb. He is a design engineer studying artificial intelligence and data science, building software, interfaces, logos, and identity systems.

item.title: Gil Rodrigues
item.author: hi@gildrb.com (Gil Rodrigues)
item.description: Gil Rodrigues is the public display name of Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa, also known as Gil Rodrigues Barbosa and gildrb. His portfolio includes Heph, a local document workspace demo that indexes armory materials, retrieves evidence, and writes cited answers. The canonical website is https://gildrb.com/.
